song.title: He Lives
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G 1) I serve a risen Savior; He’s in the world today. . G B Em I know that He is living, . A7 D7 Whatever men may say, . G I see His hand of mercy; I hear His voice of cheer; . A7 And just the time I need Him . A A7 D He’s always near. [V2] . G 2) In all the world around me I see His loving care, . G B Em And though my heart grows ,weary . A7 D7 I never will despair; . G I know that He is leading, Through all the stormy blast; . A7 The day of His appearing . A A7 D Will come at last. [C] Chorus . G C G He lives, He lives, Christ Jesus lives today! . D7 G A7 D7 He walks with me and talks with me along life’s narrow way. . G C B He lives, He lives, Salvation to impart! . E7 A7 You ask me how I know He lives? . G D7 G He lives within my heart. --- [V3] . G 3) Rejoice, rejoice, O Christian, Lift up your voice and sing . G B Em Eternal hallelujahs . A7 D7 To Jesus Christ the King!
The Hope of all who seek Him, The Help of all who find, . A7 None other is so loving, . A A7 D So good and kind.
song.author: Alfred H. Ackley
